# Army Rush Clone Game

This is an HTML5 Canvas 2D pixel art army rush clone game where:
- Players can only move horizontally (left/right arrow keys)
- Player automatically shoots projectiles
- Waves of enemies spawn and move toward the player
- Collision detection for hits and game over
- Sprite animation system ready for 2D pixel art assets

## Game Features
- Horizontal player movement only
- Automatic shooting mechanics
- Enemy wave spawning system
- Collision detection
- Score tracking
- Pixel art sprite support
- Game loop with proper timing

## Controls
- Left Arrow: Move left
- Right Arrow: Move right
- Automatic shooting (no manual control needed)

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main game page
- `js/game.js` - Core game logic and loop
- `js/player.js` - Player class and movement
- `js/enemy.js` - Enemy spawning and behavior
- `js/projectile.js` - Bullet/projectile system
- `css/style.css` - Game styling
- `assets/` - Placeholder for sprite images

## Development Notes
- Uses HTML5 Canvas for rendering
- Modular JavaScript structure
- Ready for sprite sheet integration
- Pixel art optimized (crisp rendering)
